headline: Philip Morris International to Host Webcast of 2026 Virtual Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: STAMFORD, CT, April 29, 2026--Regulatory News: Philip Morris International Inc. (PMI) (NYSE: PM) will host a live audio webcast of its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET.

headline: Philip Morris International (PM) Expands Ducati Partnership to Spotlight ZYN Brand
